title: Excalibur | Tom's Simple Storage Support
description: An excabularized style for all your containers
body:
![Mod's Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa1e5c8c4ff3bce2f7a0dd65ea9845a4e55aa1ad.png)

This **unofficial** compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Tom's Simple Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Features:**
- Redesigned all items and blocks
- GUIs for Excalibur style

**Credits:**
- Maffhew – Creator of _Excalibur_
- tom54541 – Creator of _Tom's Simple Storage_
- Ratty – Main block texture artist
- Abyssal_Kutku – Original 1.19.2 GUI

If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰

[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-toms-simple-storage-support)
